title: oldenlandia herbacea
intro: Oldenlandia herbacea, also known as Sessile Buttonbush or Lian Qiao, is a flowering plant species native to Asia and Australia. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its use in traditional Chinese medicine, where it is valued for its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Oldenlandia herbacea include its ability to lower blood pressure, improve cardiovascular health, and exhibit anti-cancer properties. Oldenlandia herbacea can be prepared into various herbal remedies, including teas, capsules, and infusions, which are often used to treat a range of health conditions, including fever, cough, and digestive issues.
